text.message: Oops, sorry didn't see your message

oj is just goated with 6 3 11 and i lose with it

I will do my best to share blocks, can only solo oj right now
bro he is ur direct comp
felt bad soloing first round though
i am sorry man i have to reply that if i roll a 7
now it will be reds turn for a while
i dont get the robs really
its always when they complain that you know somethings coming
bro look at me and i am still blocked
i thought u didnt want to solo anyone
i said i didn't want to solo anyone on the first 7
u steal from the guy with worst setup
i have the worst but u steal from me

Open settle with city in hand
